description.value: Price 12,700 gp; Slot wrists; CL 9th; Weight 12 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION This +1 repeating heavy crossbow is carved in the shape of a stylized whippoorwill; the stirrup resembles the head, the limbs look like the wings, and the stock is shaped like the birdâs tail. Nightpiercer applies the ghost touch weapon special ability to all bolts fired from it, and the bolts shriek like whippoorwills as they fly through the air. Whenever a bolt fired from Nightpiercer deals damage to an incorporeal undead creature, the bolt remains embedded in the creature, reducing all of the targetâs speeds by half (to a minimum of 5 feet) for 1 round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,700 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells dimensional anchor, plane shift
